rulings.Case Title: BAY RIDGE PROPERTIES LLC VS. AMERICAN BROKERS CONDUIT CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 20, 2016, Line 2. Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction is continued to August 31, 2016. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of the reply to department 501 no later than August 18, 2016 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MANOLO CONSTANTINO VS. KRISTOPHER HOWARD ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interoggatories And For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 20, 2016, Line 3 ( Part 2 of 2). PLAINTIFF MANOLO CONSTANTINO Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interoggatories And For Sanctions Hearing Required to address Requests 2.5; 2.6. and 2.7. Sanctions granted in the amount of $60 for filing fee. No declaration supporting attorney's fees request. =(501/REQ)
